description_long: This is a large, industrial shipping container constructed primarily from corrugated steel panels, painted in a weathered dark gray color. The container features reinforced corners and a ribbed roof for structural integrity, with visible signs of wear and scuffing along its surfaces. One end of the container has double doors, one of which is open, revealing a spacious, empty interior with a wooden floor. The front face displays bold white signage reading 'COBARK LOGISTICS PTY LTD.' with a large directional arrow, indicating its use for commercial or logistical purposes. The doors are equipped with heavy-duty locking bars and hinges, designed for secure closure and transport. This type of container is commonly found in shipping yards, industrial sites, or urban storage areas.
description: A large, weathered steel shipping container with double doors, bold white logistics signage, and a visible wooden floor inside. The exterior is dark gray with reinforced corners and heavy-duty locking mechanisms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open double doors, white 'COBARK LOGISTICS PTY LTD.' signage, and the interior wooden floor.
description_view_1: Side view with one door open, revealing the empty interior and the thickness of the steel walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, ribbed steel back with no signage or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the closed double doors with locking bars and no visible signage.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: white painted logo and arrow on front face reading 'COBARK LOGISTICS PTY LTD.'
attribute_handles_or_grips: integrated steel locking bars and handles on doors
